name: Cranberry Yogurt Muffins (Coconut, Walnut, Oats)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine oats and yogurt. Soak for 10 minutes.
2. Add oil, sugar, and egg; mix well.
3. Using a sifter, combine flour, salt, baking soda, and baking powder.
4. Sift the dry ingredients into the bowl with the wet mixture.
5. Fold in cranberries, walnuts, and coconut until just blended.
6. Spoon the batter into paper-lined muffin tins.
7. Bake: 20 minutes at 400 degrees.
Yield: 2 dozen. Cooks Note: For the second dozen, add zest from half an orange or tangelo. Vanilla yogurt may be substituted for plain.
